purpose: Facilitate flight booking and travel planning

entities.name: Flight
entities.description: A flight booking entity with details such as departure and destination locations, dates, and number of passengers

capabilities.name: Flight Booking
capabilities.description: Allows users to plan and book flights

screens.name: Flight Booking Page
screens.purpose: Allows users to plan a journey by entering departure and destination locations, selecting dates, and specifying the number of passengers

frontier.description: Explore the 'Hotels' and 'Sight Seeing' sections to confirm their existence and functionality
frontier.rationale: These sections are typically found in travel booking apps and their absence suggests they might be missing or not yet implemented
frontier.search_strategy: Check the navigation menu for 'Hotels' and 'Sight Seeing' options

anomalies.description: The app does not have a 'Hotels' or 'Sight Seeing' section in the navigation menu, which is expected for a travel booking app
